10_kalimehra_it_is_good: Kalimehra! It is good to know that you are to bring peace with the Tritons again. It will not be long before the fishermen may return to Marete.
11_i_am_to_be: I am to be a Healer! I have been spoken to by Julanar. She said that you told her of my dream. I thank you so much, my friend.
12_kalimehra_are_you_interested: Kalimehra. Are you interested in taking a boat ride today?
13_you_wish_me_to: You wish me to marry you? I am sorry, but I already have a girlfriend whom I wish to wed.
14_sokolatakya_i_do_have: Sokolatak-ya! I do have a sweet tooth, I must admit. Thank you for this gift. You are very kind.
15_many_thanks_but_i: Many thanks, but I do not need such a thing.
16_i_mostly_use_anchovies: I mostly use anchovies to attract bigger fish, but they can be eaten. Would you like some? I am happy to share. Here, take a few.
17_i_am_out_on: I am out on this dock on most mornings. I fish for most of the day and evening, and come back in the night. I know the waters around Silmaria in my sleep.
18_i_do_not_think: I do not think I would like to be a King. If I could, I would become a great healer, and make everyone well and happy. That is a much better job than giving everyone orders, at least to me.
19_if_you_ever_wish: If you ever wish to go for a boat ride, I'll be happy to take you around the bay or to the nearby islands. Any further out than that, and boats are attacked by sea creatures.
1_anchovies_on_pizza_what: Anchovies on pizza? What a strange idea! Good thing I really like anchovies. Thank you very much for this.
20_it_was_good_speaking: It was good speaking with you. Yassas.
21_most_fishermen_on_marete: Most fishermen on Marete live in the villages outside town. That is, they used to live there.
22_they_have_been_driven: They have been driven from their homes by attacks from armed mercenaries. They have been driven from the sea by attacks from Tritons and sea monsters. Most have left this island.
23_i_am_the_sole: I am the sole remaining Silmarian fisherman.
24_yassas_it_is_nice: Yassas! It is nice to see a new face around here.
25_silmaria_is_the_only: Silmaria is the only city on the island of Marete. Marete is a large island, as you can see if you look on the map. In good years, you can sail around the entire island. This is not a good year, and the seas are too dangerous to travel that far.
26_ive_never_spoken_with: I've never spoken with a Hero like you before. I am honored.
27_the_mercenaries_are_armed: The mercenaries are armed soldiers who have been sailing into the fishing villages and driving all the fisherfolk away. They could invade the city any day.
28_tritons_are_halfmen_halffish: Tritons are half-men, half-fish people who live under the water. They used to be friendly and helpful to fishermen.
29_lately_though_they_have: Lately, though, they have attacked every ship that sails past the nearby islands. No one knows why they have become hostile.
2_i_am_very_fond: I am very fond of pizza. This is very kind of you to share this with me.
30_the_fishing_has_been: The fishing has been poor the last few days. I am having to fish the same locations over and over. I hope you and your friends will drive away the mercenaries so that I can fish the islands again.
31_good_luck_i_hope: Good luck. I hope you drive the mercenaries far from our shores.
32_every_time_i_travel: Every time I travel near the small islands in the daytime, I am attacked by a boat of the mercenaries who shoot at me. I do not have many places I can fish right now.
33_the_fishing_villages_are: The fishing villages are now too dangerous to sail too close. The mercenaries shoot arrows at my boat. However, they are only a day's travel from here by land. To go to Naxos, go west, and take the road to the south.
34_it_is_good_to: It is good to see you again.
35_perhaps_they_have_a: Perhaps they have a camp somewhere in the islands. I have been attacked by a boat of mercenaries whenever I approach that area by day.
36_you_are_supposed_to: You are supposed to drive away the mercenaries by yourself? It seems to be an impossible task.
37_still_it_seems_impossible: Still, it seems impossible that one person could take on all the mercenaries in a fishing village, and yet you proved that this could be done. I am very impressed.
38_as_soon_as_i: As soon as I heard the rumor that the Hydra had been destroyed, I tried to see if I could get there. Unfortunately, by the time I got near the island, it was time to return.
39_good_luck_on_your: Good luck on your quest. Yassas.
3_they_are_very_pretty: They are very pretty. Did you pick them for a girlfriend?
40_there_are_a_string: There are a string of islands not far from the coast of Marete. Some are full islands and have names. Some are no more than rocks sticking out of the water.
41_the_main_islands_are: The main islands are Psara, Piperi, Kea, Sifnos, and Spetsai. There is another string of islands a little farther out, but it is too dangerous to go there right now.
42_yassas_it_is_good: Yassas! It is good to know that the Hydra could not defeat you.
43_i_have_missed_the: I have missed the company of other fishermen as I work. It is not very safe to be out on the sea by one's self.
44_i_wish_you_good: I wish you good luck on your next Rite. I'm certain you will need it.
45_ive_been_told_stories: I've been told stories of the Hydra in my youth. It must have been a great honor to defeat such a legendary creature.
46_the_islands_near_hydra: The islands near Hydra are known to have fierce monsters living there. We fishermen have always avoided that area. I think that is why the Tritons did not attack my ship last night. They did not expect me to be in that area.
47_welcome_if_theres_any: Welcome. If there's any sailing you wish to do, just let me know.
48_i_am_so_thrilled: I am so thrilled. I am to study with Julanar in the Spring. I cannot thank you enough for this. I would not have dared to speak with the Healer.
49_i_know_that_you: I know that you will bring peace soon. You have done so much already. Yassas!
4_kalimehra_that_means_good: Kalimehra! That means 'good day' here in Silmaria. Welcome to our city. I hope you find happiness on this island.
50_if_you_do_make: If you do make peace with the Tritons, our people would welcome you gladly as King of Silmaria.
51_i_have_found_that: I have found that the Tritons are most aggressive when I sail off the west coast of Marete past Naxos.
52_yassas_my_friend_you: Yassas, my friend. You are a real Hero to me.
54_thank_you_again_it: Thank you again. It may not seem like much to you, but for me, it is a great kindness.
55_i_am_a_fisherman: I am a fisherman because my father and grandfather were fishermen. I will become a Healer because I want to become one. It is good to know that dreams can come true, if you work to make it so.
56_julanar_is_a_wonderful: Julanar is a wonderful woman. She told me what I need to learn before I become her apprentice. I will be studying very hard before I go to learn from her. It is so much better than fishing.
57_yassas_that_is_the: Yassas. That is the Silmarian greeting.
58_i_catch_only_a: I catch only a few fish each day. This is a bad time of year, for the large fish swim to deep water. Only the small fish remain near the shallows.
59_the_large_fish_are: The large fish are very good to eat. There is more meat than bone upon them, and they are easier to scale.
5_i_am_andre_a: I am Andre, a fisherman. I am also happy to ferry people to the nearby islands on my boat.
60_small_fish_are_usually: Small fish are usually young fish who are avoiding the bigger predators. I use a rope net to catch them. For anchovies, I must use a cloth net.
61_my_boat_can_be: My boat can be rented any morning before I go off to fish.
62_yassas_that_is_the: Yassas. That is the Silmarian farewell.
63_is_it_not_a: Is it not a beautiful day to be sailing? It is a true pity that we cannot sail far, for there are so many dangers we must avoid right now.
64_we_dare_not_go: We dare not go far, but when I next go fishing, I shall be testing to see if we can go farther out.
65_you_may_guide_the: You may guide the boat, but I shall make certain we do not travel beyond where it is safe.
66_we_cannot_go_further: We cannot go further to the north. We shall be attacked by mercenaries, and I dare not risk my boat.
67_we_must_turn_around: We must turn around now. Sea monsters have been spotted in the area near the eastern islands.
68_the_islands_south_of: The islands south of this point have many mercenary ships. We cannot travel far from the shoreline of Marete.
69_this_is_as_far: This is as far west as we may go. Between the Hesparian mercenaries and the Tritons, there are too many dangers ahead.
6_greetings_so_you_are: Greetings! So you are competing to become King of Silmaria in the Rulership Rites. It will be good to have the fishing villages free from the mercenaries. I hope you are all successful.
70_i_have_heard_that: I have heard that you are seeking the mercenaries. They are rumored to have a fortress on the island of Sifnos to the southwest.
71_i_believe_that_the: I believe that the mercenaries have retreated to Sifnos. Shall we find out?
72_we_still_cannot_travel: We still cannot travel far to the north without being attacked by ships filled with archers.
73_sea_dragons_are_nasty: Sea dragons are nasty, for they spew poison when they attack. It would be best to turn around now.
74_it_is_best_to: It is best to hug the southern shoreline still. The mercenaries patrol the island chain, and we do not wish to alert them.
75_we_are_beyond_the: We are beyond the island of Sifnos, and into the territory of the Tritons. We must turn back.
76_i_will_let_you: I will let you off near Sifnos, but I cannot stay. They constantly patrol this area by ship. If they spot my boat, they will alert the fortress.
77_you_do_not_have: You do not have a way to return safely to Silmaria? I thought you were an experienced adventurer. Most of them around here have Mystic Magnets to escape danger. We shall return to Silmaria then.
78_we_are_approaching_sifnos: We are approaching Sifnos. I do not want to be seen, so we shall wait until dark to land this ship. You will need the cover of darkness to aid you.
79_now_that_the_mercenaries: Now that the mercenaries have been defeated, we can travel much farther south than before.
7_kalimehra_so_you_are: Kalimehra! So you are hunting for the leader of the mercenaries. If you need to look off the island of Marete, let me know. My boat is always ready in the morning.
80_perhaps_you_wish_to: Perhaps you wish to explore some of the uninhabited islands to the south? You can find interesting creatures there.
81_there_are_still_ships: There are still ships in this area which have driven me off. I do not know who they are, but I will not risk my ship to find out.
82_the_eastern_islands_have: The eastern islands have always had sea monsters swarming around them. I have wondered whether the Hydra attracts them in some way. We must turn back soon.
83_this_is_as_far: This is as far south from Marete as I will sail.
84_the_tritons_have_been: The Tritons have been very dangerous lately. We must turn around.
85_if_you_are_seeking: If you are seeking a way to Hydra Island, you will need to find another way to get there. I cannot get near there.
86_i_have_often_wondered: I have often wondered what it would be like to fly over the water rather than sail the sea. It would probably be safer.
87_now_that_the_hydra: Now that the Hydra has been defeated, I can get over to the eastern islands without being attacked by sea monsters. They no longer guard those shores.
88_the_tritons_seem_to: The Tritons seem to be more aggressive than ever. I think that the mercenaries had been stirring up trouble with them, and we pay the price.
89_we_still_cannot_go: We still cannot go far to the north. The only thing up in that direction is Minos Island, so I do not know why we are being driven away.
8_great_we_shall_go: Great! We shall go for a boat ride together. You guide the way, and I'll sail.
90_we_should_turn_back: We should turn back now. I do not want the Tritons to attack.
91_ive_done_much_exploration: I've done much exploration lately. I have found the Tritons are most numerous between the islands of Kea, Psara, and Skyros. We can get near parts of all three islands though.
92_i_suspect_atlantis_is: I suspect Atlantis is near Skyros. We might be able to get near the island if we approach it from the west.
93_i_am_seeing_signs: I am seeing signs of Tritons under the waters ahead of us. We must turn aside.
94_it_is_wonderful_to: It is wonderful to sail wherever I wish without danger. However, I am still driven away from the waters around Minos Island.
95_i_have_seen_the: I have seen the Tritons watching me as I sail near their territory. I do not think they entirely trust me, but they do not attack. Let us hope that peace is permanent.
9_the_hydra_is_dead: The Hydra is dead! It is amazing. I managed to sail near Hydra Island last night. As long as I swing the boat near the shores of the islands, I am not attacked by the Tritons.
